testcase.name: Footer > should render the brand name Clothify
Footer > should render the copyright text
Footer > should render the tagline text
Footer > should render a link to the products page
Footer > should render a link to the about page
Footer > should render the Shop and About section headings
Footer > should render the footer element with the correct CSS class
Footer > the products link should have the correct href
Footer > the about link should have the correct href
Header NOT Logged in > should display logo
Header NOT Logged in > should display links
Header NOT Logged in > should NOT display Auth submenu
Header NOT Logged in > should display cart
Header Logged in > should display logo
Header Logged in > should display links
Header Logged in > should display Auth submenu
Header Logged in > should display cart
Home Hero Not Logged In > should display welcome
Home Hero Not Logged In > should display title
Home Hero Not Logged In > should display text
Home Hero Not Logged In > should display shop button
Home Hero Not Logged In > should display meta
Home Hero Not Logged In > should display hero card
Home Hero Not Logged In > should display floating bar with user count
Home Hero Not Logged In > should NOT display authenticated user details
Home Hero Logged In > should display welcome
Home Hero Logged In > should display title
Home Hero Logged In > should display text
Home Hero Logged In > should display shop button
Home Hero Logged In > should display meta
Home Hero Logged In > should display hero card
Home Hero Logged In > should display floating bar with user count
Home Hero Logged In > should display authenticated user details
SimilarProducts > when the cart is empty > should NOT render the section at all
SimilarProducts > when the cart is empty > should NOT render the section when cart is null
SimilarProducts > when the cart has items > should render the 'You may also like' heading
SimilarProducts > when the cart has items > should render all product titles
SimilarProducts > when the cart has items > should render prices with the euro symbol
SimilarProducts > when the cart has items > should render an 'Add to cart' button for each product
SimilarProducts > when the cart has items > should render product images with correct alt text
SimilarProducts > when the cart has items > should call onAddToCart with the correct product when clicking 'Add to cart'
SimilarProducts > when the cart has items > should call onAddToCart with the second product when clicking its button
SimilarProducts > when the cart has items > should call onAddToCart exactly once per click
